# Yanis Sebastian Zürcher

> Yanis Sebastian Zürcher is a software developer based in Zürich, Switzerland, specializing in full-stack development, web applications, and modern technologies.

Also goes by Sebi Zürcher. Currently studying software engineering at WISS, working a software engineering internship at Nadlo (React, Next.js, NestJS, Supabase), and taking on freelance/contract web development (React, Next.js, Spring Boot) on the side. Has a background in identity & access management and cybersecurity from a prior IAM internship. Personal projects mostly run on React/Next.js/TypeScript on the frontend with Supabase/PostgreSQL for data, Spring Boot or Rust where a project calls for it, and a long-running interest in offensive security (OSINT, Kali Linux, Burp Suite). Content is available in English, German, Spanish, Japanese, and Chinese via a language switcher; the URLs below serve the English version.

## Pages

- [Home](https://sola.ysz.life/): Introduction and quick links to socials and contact.
- [About](https://sola.ysz.life/about): Background, interests, and personal story.
- [Experience](https://sola.ysz.life/experience): Work history and professional roles.
- [Projects](https://sola.ysz.life/projects): Full list of software projects, including smaller/archived ones not listed below.
- [Skills](https://sola.ysz.life/skills): Technical skills and proficiency levels.
- [Certifications](https://sola.ysz.life/certifications): Certificates and credentials earned.
- [Services](https://sola.ysz.life/services): Freelance and contract services offered.
- [Contact](https://sola.ysz.life/contact): Contact form and direct contact links.

## Projects

Ordered by current relevance. Each has its own deep-dive page.

- [Kinoa](https://sola.ysz.life/projects/kinoa): Free streaming site for films and series, no subscription — Next.js App Router, Supabase, PostgreSQL.
- [Sola](https://sola.ysz.life/projects/sola): This portfolio site — React (Vite), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Three.js.
- [magi](https://sola.ysz.life/projects/magi): Fast, asynchronous TCP/UDP port scanner written in Rust with tokio.
- [Luma](https://sola.ysz.life/projects/luma): Multi-model, bring-your-own-key AI chat platform — Next.js 16, Vercel AI SDK, Supabase.
- [AppliCare](https://sola.ysz.life/projects/applicare): Job application tracking system — React (Vite), Spring Boot, MongoDB.
- [Self](https://sola.ysz.life/projects/self): Customizable Windows system-info display tool inspired by Neofetch, built with Python.
- [Website Code Extractor](https://sola.ysz.life/projects/code-extractor): Chrome extension for extracting and downloading a website's source code.
- [Thoughts](https://sola.ysz.life/projects/thoughts): Minimal personal site for reflections and notes, with a custom guestbook.
- [Taco](https://sola.ysz.life/projects/taco): Production-ready Next.js template site with localization and a blog, centered on my brother's dog.
